sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented in available sources. Turn-based tactics game without documented sub-pixel movement precision requirements.

special_mechanics.name: Underwater Physics
special_mechanics.description: Battles take place underwater with physics identical to ground battles. Certain weapons cannot be used on surface/land missions due to water environment constraints.

special_mechanics.name: Turn-Based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses turn-based tactical combat from isometric view. Movement is grid/tile-based rather than continuous physics-based.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (T2) - Turn-based strategy/tactics game with no documented physics parameters. Movement is grid-based tactical positioning rather than continuous physics simulation. No jump, gravity, acceleration, or sub-pixel precision mechanics documented because game operates on turn-based tile/grid system.
sources_used: wikipedia - X-COM: Terror from the Deep article
